assessment.note: Says load has eased but a fragmented calendar is still creating day-to-day friction; also flags an untouched wellbeing signal worth probing next.

new_queue.label: Opening pace check
new_queue.name: How's the last two weeks actually felt — energy-wise?
new_queue.description: Opener that invites a real answer rather than 'fine'. Reads wellbeing directly.

new_queue.label: Priority clarity
new_queue.name: What are you actually focused on this week, and why those things?
new_queue.description: Surfaces whether priorities are crisp or vague; whether they match what you thought.

new_queue.label: Visibility gap
new_queue.name: Where does your work feel least visible right now, Nina?
new_queue.description: Finds the specific point where strong execution is not being seen or credited.

new_queue.label: Influence bottleneck
new_queue.name: What’s getting in the way when you try to move things with stakeholders?
new_queue.description: Maps the practical blocker to influence rather than staying at the level of frustration.

new_queue.label: Support shape
new_queue.name: What kind of support from me would actually change your week?
new_queue.description: Lets her define the most useful manager help without assuming the fix.

new_queue.label: Steadier finish
new_queue.name: What would make the next two weeks steadier for you?
new_queue.description: Closes on concrete changes that would reduce load or friction without opening new topics.
